findings.message: Consumer code extracts 'reserved_count' from response (line 14) but this field is not declared in the pact interaction (see comment on line 13). This creates a contract gap: the provider has no contractual obligation to include this field, so the code will fail at runtime with a KeyError if the provider omits it.
findings.suggestion: Regenerate and publish the consumer pact to include 'reserved_count' in the expected response body with appropriate matchers, then commit the updated pact. The pact test must assert on this field to create a contractual obligation for the provider to include it.
